definitions.text: To move, or appear to move, physically upwards relative to the ground. To move upwards.
examples: Disturbed by my footsteps, the birds rose above the treetops.
Disturbed by my footsteps, the birds rose above the treetops.

definitions.text: To grow upward; to attain a certain height.
examples: This elm tree rises to a height of seventy feet.

definitions.text: The process of or an action or instance of moving upwards or becoming greater.
examples: There was a rise of nearly two degrees since yesterday.

definitions.text: The process of or an action or instance of coming to prominence.
examples: The rise of the working class.
The rise of the printing press.

definitions.text: An increase in a quantity, price, etc.
